home.subtitle: Leveraging advanced machine learning algorithms to provide rapid, accurate, and preliminary insights into Autism Spectrum Disorder traits using a standardized behavioral and medical assessment.

predict.title: Assessment Form
predict.jaundice_desc: Did the patient have jaundice at birth?
predict.family_desc: Does any immediate family member have ASD?
predict.used_desc: Has the patient taken this test before?
predict.step3_desc: Please answer Yes (1) or No (0) for the following behavioral traits.
predict.q1: I often notice small sounds when others do not.
predict.q2: I usually concentrate more on the whole picture, rather than the small details.
predict.q3: I find it easy to do more than one thing at once.
predict.q4: If there is an interruption, I can switch back to what I was doing very quickly.
predict.q5: I find it easy to 'read between the lines' when someone is talking to me.
predict.q6: I know how to tell if someone listening to me is getting bored.
predict.q7: When I'm reading a story, I find it difficult to work out the characters' intentions.
predict.q8: I like to collect information about categories of things (e.g., types of car, bird, train, plant).
predict.q9: I find it easy to work out what someone is thinking or feeling just by looking at their face.
predict.q10: I find it difficult to work out people's intentions.
predict.error_network: Failed to connect to the prediction API. Ensure the Flask server is running.

results.title: Analysis Complete
results.subtitle: AI diagnostic inference executed successfully.
results.desc_positive: The neural network has identified behavioral and medical patterns highly correlated with Autism Spectrum Disorder. A formal clinical evaluation is recommended.
results.desc_negative: The neural network found no significant patterns correlating with Autism Spectrum Disorder based on the provided inputs.
results.summary_desc: 10 behavioral traits and 5 demographic/medical indicators were processed through the classification model.

about.title: About the
about.subtitle: Understanding the technology and purpose behind our Autism Detection AI System.
about.overview_desc: This project was developed as a university presentation to demonstrate the practical application of machine learning in the medical and psychological diagnostics field. The system is designed to assess the likelihood of Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD) traits based on a series of behavioral questions and personal demographic data.
about.tech_ml_desc: A classification model trained on established ASD screening datasets.
about.tech_backend_desc: Flask (Python) API serving the model inference logic.
about.tech_frontend_desc: React + Vite with futuristic glassmorphism UI.
about.process_desc: The AI evaluates 10 specific behavioral traits (A1-A10) combined with clinical indicators like Jaundice history and genetic predisposition (family history).
about.disclaimer_desc: This tool is for educational purposes only and is not a substitute for professional medical diagnosis.
